name: GumOps
description: Gumroad operations agent with working memory. Query products, manage sales, interact with the LMS SDK, and maintain a persistent local memory store — all via a local LLM.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Ask the GumOps agent a question. The agent uses working memory and available Gumroad tools to respond.

text.description: The question or instruction to send to the GumOps agent.

tools.name: refresh_memory
tools.description: Refresh working memory with the latest data from Gumroad.

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List all keys currently stored in working memory.

tools.name: memory_get
tools.description: Retrieve a working memory entry by key.

tools.name: memory_add
tools.description: Add or update a working memory entry.

value.description: The value to store (string or JSON).

tools.name: memory_find
tools.description: Search working memory entries by a query string.

query.description: Search query to match against memory keys, values, and metadata.

tools.name: list_tools
tools.description: List all tools available to the GumOps agent.
